task: Bypass slow safety coach paths for current concept example questions

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires real verification before reporting done, and code or UI changes require completion evidence.
Code, deploy, UI, and customer-facing answer changes require real entrypoint verification and completion evidence guard.

changes: Added an endpoint-level fast return for current-concept prompt example questions before cache lookup, public LLM gate, RAG retrieval, or LLM generation.
Kept safety coach event logging for the fast return so the answer remains visible in history and question collection flows.
Allowed current-concept fast answers to remain active even when reinforcement policies exist, preventing policy-driven fallback into slow LLM generation for this deterministic case.

verification.name: edu app production build
